items.briefing:
A new report from Synack highlights a growing gap in vulnerability testing — meaning many organisations have security weaknesses that aren't being found before attackers do. This is a timely reminder for RTOs to ensure systems holding student and staff data are regularly checked for vulnerabilities. Separately, scammers are increasingly impersonating well-known figures, including athletes and celebrities, to trick people into handing over money or personal information — a tactic that can affect anyone online.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message or payment request from someone famous or unexpected, verify it through official channels before responding or clicking any links.
